PropertySetConfig.text: I hereby certify that all of the information provided on this application is true and accurate to the best of my knowledge. I acknowledge receipt and advisement of the notices above, and I agree to and accept the limitation of liability against the State. I assume any and all risk or liability that may result under the State or federal laws arising from the possession, use, or cultivation, administration, or dispensing of medical cannabis. I understand that the medical cannabis laws and enforcement thereof of the State and the federal government are subject to change at any time. I sign this attestation willingly and without reservation and am fully aware of its meaning
